# Roberts Line

Tracing back from [[William Roberts 1918]]. Confirmed to 1889 (Henry). Brick wall before that in Cook County.

- [ ] Verify [[Foster Line]] connection via Janet's library tip.

# Hermle Mantel Clock

Seized train, worn bushings at third wheel. Ordered suspension spring and verge from Spengler.

- Re-seated suspension spring; end shake corrected. It runs.

# Medication Schedule

- Allopurinol 300 mg - every morning after breakfast
- Vitamin D3 2000 IU - daily
- Omega-3 fish oil 1000 mg - daily
- Multivitamin - daily
- Colchicine 0.6 mg - at flare onset only
- Acetaminophen 500 mg - as needed for knees

# Gout Triggers

Avoid: beer (worst), dehydration, stress, organ meats, too much red meat.
Last flare Feb 2026, right big toe, 5 days. Caught early with colchicine.

# A1c Log

- 2024: 5.8% (diagnosed prediabetes)
- Oct 2026: 5.7% (improved). Dr. Ivers: stay the course.

# On Carol

Forty-four years. Her reading chair stays where it is. The garden still comes up every spring, which is its own kind of message.

# On Janet

Dinner at Il Forno again. She is easy company and reads more than I do, which I did not think possible. Genuinely happy. Genuinely scared. Both can be true.

# 2026-10-07 Daily

Notes on 2026-10-07 daily.

Notes on 2026-10-08 daily.

# Monthly Review

Pension and Social Security steady. Edward Jones allocation holding. Note: ask Paul about year-end gifting for the kids and grandkids.
